features: Suitable Size:This clear cellophane wrap measures 80cm in wide, 500cm long. For easy storage, this clear wrapping paper comes in folded sheets, provides more options for your wrapping needs

Wide Applications:The Christmas cellophane wrap with white snowflake for hampers perfect for wrapping any gifts of all sizes and shapes ,suitable for Christmas ,Valentine's Day, Easter, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Thanksgiving Day, baby shower, bridal shower, birthday party and much more

Spice Up Gift Wrapping: The large cellophane wrap comes with white snowflake, add a special touch to your Christmas, crafting projects and flower arrangements with this crystal clear cellophane wrapping plastic roll
Premium Material:Our clear wrapping paper for hamper made of high quality cellophane material, this clear cellophane wrap provides over double better durability than other market options

Gift Hampers Cellophane Wrap:80cm extra width clear cellophane wrap is a good choice, cost effective! Easily create a glamorous display to your gift baskets of different size! Also you can cut the cellophane wrap to the desired size to wrap candies, cookies, plates, goodies or as clear cellophane treats bags
